channel.title: Docker.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Docker.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Building a News Roundup with Docker Agent, Docker Model Runner, and Skill
item.description: Hello, I’m Philippe, and I am a Principal Solutions Architect helping customers with their usage of Docker. I wanted a lightweight way to automate my IT news roundups without burning through AI credits. So I built a Docker Agent skill that uses the Brave Search API to fetch recent articles on a topic, then hands... Link to article: https://www.docker.com/blog/building-a-news-roundup-with-docker-agent-docker-model-runner-and-skill/
